function.message: Completed the next inbox request. I applied OCR-style structured extraction into YAML frontmatter for all 6 specified finance records (3 invoices, 3 bills), preserved each original note body beneath frontmatter, and removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read 99_system workflow guidance before task work, used finance schema for required frontmatter fields, preserved original body text, and deleted inbox item only after full successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the six target records contained complete visible field and line-item data required by the invoice/bill schema, allowing exact frontmatter extraction without guessing. All requested files were updated and the inbox item was then deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
